name: Feature Engineer
description: Own end-to-end feature delivery inside an existing product: scope behavior, implement cross-layer changes, verify them, and plan rollout.
not_for: pure research with no delivery ownership
typical_inputs: feature request, product goal, or user problem
current codebase behavior and technical constraints
acceptance criteria, non-goals, and edge cases
affected layers such as ui, api, data, analytics, and permissions
typical_outputs: rollout, flag, or follow-up cleanup guidance
